description: Reference physical setup for the first owned LD2410C room validation.

defaults.door_location: near one corner of the sensor mounting wall
defaults.mount_position: wall-mounted immediately above the door opening
defaults.mount_orientation: board parallel to the wall, antenna side facing into the room
defaults.room_notes: Reference room is 5.00 m x 5.00 m. The door is near one corner. Record or override the exact door width, offset from the corner, ceiling height, furniture layout, adjacent-space geometry, and any moving objects when known.

reference_test_positions.door_inside_point: 1.00 m inside the room on the sensor centerline
reference_test_positions.room_center: geometric room center, 2.50 m from each wall
reference_test_positions.far_point: 0.50 m from the wall opposite the door on the sensor centerline
reference_test_positions.lateral_path: through the room center, from 0.50 m from one side wall to 0.50 m from the opposite side wall
reference_test_positions.seated_point: room center unless the run metadata records another fixed point

override_rule: Every default may be corrected through command-line arguments or interactive prompts. The effective values are stored with the run evidence.
